schema.description:
Full study-guide payload for the detail endpoint. Includes
content (excluded from the list payload) plus the
authenticated user's own vote state and the nested
recommenders / quizzes / resources / files arrays.

creator.description:
Compact user payload used as the `creator` of a study guide. Same
privacy floor as SectionMemberResponse -- no email, no clerk_id.
creator.title: CreatorSummary

course.description:
Compact course payload embedded in StudyGuideDetailResponse.
Mirrors EnrollmentCourseSummary but lives here separately so
the two surfaces can evolve independently.
course.title: GuideCourseSummary

items.description:
Compact user payload used as the `creator` of a study guide. Same
privacy floor as SectionMemberResponse -- no email, no clerk_id.
items.title: CreatorSummary

items.description:
Compact quiz payload embedded in StudyGuideDetailResponse.
Privacy floor: id + title + question_count only. Creator id,
quiz content, and scoring config are intentionally absent --
the quiz detail endpoint (future ticket ASK-142) is the source
of truth for those.
items.title: QuizSummary

items.description:
Compact resource payload embedded in StudyGuideDetailResponse.
No creator or uploader info -- the study-guide detail caller
does not need to know who attached the resource.
items.title: ResourceSummary

items.description:
Compact file payload embedded in StudyGuideDetailResponse.
Privacy floor: id + name + mime_type + size only. Owner,
s3_key, and checksum are intentionally absent.
items.title: StudyGuideFileSummary

schema.title: StudyGuideDetailResponse

schema.description: Standardized error response structure matching application error domains
schema.title: AppError

schema.title: AppError

schema.title: AppError
